source_text:
DECISION: We're going with React for the frontend rewrite.
ACTION: Sarah to create the project repo and set up the initial scaffolding by end of week.
DECISION: We'll use PostgreSQL instead of MongoDB for the new service.
ACTION: Mike to evaluate the migration effort and report back by next Wednesday.
ACTION: Team to review the API contract and provide feedback by Friday.
NOTE: The client wants a progress update on the 20th.
ACTION: Prepare the progress update presentation for the client meeting on the 20th.
